Off Calendar May-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections to special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
